title: Superb Warfare
description: A warfare themed mod with various guns, huge cannons and powerful vehicles
body:
![Superb Warfare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16757af7cf871bcd4fc4f2473ff596fdbb5fd95f_0.webp)

# Superb FPS Experience in Minecraft
**SuperbWarfare** is a warfare themed mod with various guns, huge cannons and powerful vehicles. 

**Features**

- Smooth Animations – Every gun features high-quality animations, from reloading to aiming, delivering an immersive shooting experience.
- Powerful Artillery & Explosives – Unleash destruction with a variety of heavy weaponry, from rocket launchers to the annihilator energy cannon.
- Armored Vehicles & War Machines – Dominate the battlefield with tanks, helicopters, and other fully drivable war vehicles.
- Gun Perk System – Customize your playstyle with different weapon perks, enhancing damage, fire rate and more.

---

# WARNING

The Superb Warfare (SBW) is a Java Edition mod, and the mod's artistic assets (textures, models, animations) are proprietary to the development team, with all rights reserved. The development team has not authorized any other projects (especially the **Bedrock** version mod) to use the artistic assets of this mod. Any appearance of our mod's artistic assets in other projects constitutes **illegal** misappropriation. The development team strongly condemns any acts of infringement or theft and urges the responsible parties to immediately cease such infringing activities.

**This mod HAS NO BEDROCK EDTION. DO NOT PAY FOR ANY SERVER OR PROJECTS RELATED TO THIS MOD.**

---

**We have turned on BLOCK DESTRUCTION by default from 0.7.0 version, be careful!**

# FAQ

**How to enable/disable explosion destruction**

Edit your server config at (your save)/serverconfig/superbwarfare-server.toml. Set explosion_destroy to true/false.

Or use command /sbw config explosionDestroy true/false

**Server crashed after installing this mod**

SBW doesn't support Arclight server.

For Mohist Server, use mohist-1.20.1-ab9cdbe3-server version or above to avoid crashing.

# Installation

Requirements:

- Forge 47.2.0 or above
- Geckolib 4.4.4-1.20.1 or above
- Curios Api 5.4.2-1.20.1 or above

You can also install Cloth Config 11.1.106-1.20.1 to change configs in-game.
